string.text: We have an urgent problem, meet me asap at HQ.
I'm omw. give me a few minutes
Can I have the details sent over? I'll get on it.
I'm in the middle of something, sorry.
You're in the middle of something?! Get your fucking ass here
Jeez, slow down your horses. Details and I'll think about it
Listen, kid. I don't have fucking time for jokes rn. You have 5 minutes to get your ass here before I send encouragement.
Glad you came, there's this new situation that I think might interest you, earn your keep in here.
We have a deal with the mercs where occasionally we run drug mules to them, I am a man down and need you to escort our guy to merc checkpoint up the road.
As long as it isn't a suicide mission, I am in.
We don't do that here to our brothers
I don't appreciate that tone Lukash
Do i need to remind your position?
You can't be serious - you know that doesn't work on me, Lukash.
You've been on fucking thin ice and now this shit? Last chance, $player_name, before you become another forgotten name. Don't make me lose patience, kiddo.
Sorry, Lukash. I don't know what I was thinking when typing that. I'm omw.
Getting a bit sick of your empty threats.
I'm tired of you. Don't ever show your face anywhere near Warehouses. You were warned.
Fine, I was just fucking around with you, sorry. I'm coming.
Who do you think you are? We'll talk about it later, don't think that I'll forget it. Now get your ass here already.
I think you can handle this.
Why did we just watch you kill some of your own!?
You want more of these in future?
Had enough of Lukash and his shit.
Yea we can tell, you know you won't make it alone we could use a guy like you... potentially.
Clearly, you have some issues with Lukash, and seeing how you handled those pricks - we could use guys like you in Duty, you know?
I don't speak with Duty pigs, fuck off.

I just saw a bunch of freedomers hunting you, a freedomer, all across the Warehouses and you are telling me you okay with that and still hate Duty for your miserable life? Fuck, they must've brainwashed you hard.
I get what you saying, but I dont really have time to chit-chat with you now. Lukash will most likely send more people after me so I need to lay low.
Duty can help you with that. We'll send a patrol down the road to our checkpoint so it should be safe. I'll put in a good word for you - colonel will be waiting for you on Rostok.
Anything else i need to know?
Need to know basis, mule will let me know once he's reached the destination.
Go now before you piss me off.
Ok, I agree that I need a safe harbour. Maybe Duty isn't that bad when I think about it now, you know?
Just don't do anything stupid. Duty will take care of you.
We have a deal with the mercs where ocasionally we run drug mules to them, I am a man down and need you to escort our guy to merc checkpoint up the road.
I already have a bunch of other tasks I need to finish in time.
OI Fucktard, I am your superior giving you an order it isn't a request. I merely gave you the illusion of choice out of kindness to your stupidity.
I don't know what i was thinking, what do you need me to do?
That's fucking better. We have a deal with the mercs where occasionally we run drug mules to them, I am a man down and need you to escort our guy to merc checkpoint up the road.
...I don't know what i was thinking
I don't need you to think. I want you to escort my runner up to the merc checkpoint, that's it. He'll tell me once he arrives safe. Don't fuck this up.
I don't take shit from anyone blyat.
I apologize, I am on it.
Greetings, I've been told about your situation, but I want to hear it from you. Don't worry, you are safe here. For now at least.
Hello, I guess? Yeah, about that....do you want the long version or a short one?
Hey, yeah, I just realized that I'm not really interested in betraying my people. You can kill me right here, but I won't side with Duty. Never.

That's bold of you. So you just came here to waste my time? Duty isn't as groundless as Freedom - we gave you a word that you'll be safe here and we will keep our word. But you are not welcome here anymore, so just walk away. Don't use our h

So, basically, I just refused one of the Lukash's pointless errands. I got tired of them long time ago, but made up my guts to speak up to him only now. Still don't know if I regret about it, so yeah... I said some things to Lukash and he sent someone after me, I even knew some of these guys, but obviously I had to shoot them and run somewhere Freedom can't find me. Some of your guys saw it and contacted me and I agreed that I will at least try to talk to you in exchange for a safe place for now.
Mhm... Yes, Freedom infiltrators can't get here, but it goes without saying that you can't hide here forever, at least if you don't plan to be useful to Duty.
I said some things to Lukash and now he hates me and all the Freedom goes with it along too, I guess... I can't go back anymore, I know that for sure.
As I said, don't worry, Lukash can't get you here. Stick around here for some time, maybe help us a little and you could even get a chance to retaliate later. What do you say?
While you was out another one of our mules has gone AWOL i need you to find him.
